creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sat         2007-07-16 12:44:12 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/xpi-firebug      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Add port www/xpi-firebug:
  
  Firebug integrates with Firefox to put a wealth of web development tools
  at your fingertips while you browse. You can edit, debug, and monitor
  CSS, HTML, and JavaScript live in any web page.
  
  WWW: http://www.getfirebug.com/
  
  PR:             ports/114527
  Submitted by:   Lapo Luchini <lapo@lapo.it>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1864    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +20 -0     ports/www/xpi-firebug/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/xpi-firebug/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/xpi-firebug/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/www/xpi-firebug/pkg-plist (new)
